name: Conversational Assistant
description: A complete single-agent chat application with tools, multi-turn memory, and streaming responses. Includes both Strands and LangGraph implementations, a React chat UI, and Terraform for AgentCore deployment.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the conversational agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Single agent with tools and multi-turn conversation memory. The agent maintains context across messages, uses tools when needed, and streams responses. This is the most common starting pattern for chat-based AI applications.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
